hero.indexTitle: Executive transport & moving services in Buenos Aires.
hero.indexSubtitle: Airport transfers, full-service moves with handyman, and door-to-door delivery — booked via WhatsApp. English-speaking team, flat-rate quotes.
hero.aboutTitle: Moving Buenos Aires with the reliability of an executive service.
hero.servicesSubtitle: From a small package to a full move with handyman. Quote it via WhatsApp.
hero.pricingSubtitle: Every trip and move is different. We reply within minutes with the price.
hero.gallerySubtitle: Some of the services we delivered in Buenos Aires.
hero.contactTitle: Drop us a line. We reply fast.
hero.contactSubtitle: Reach us via WhatsApp, phone, or this form.

porQue.title: Reliability with the speed of a WhatsApp message.
porQue.intro: We combine the seriousness of an executive transport service with the closeness of a local team. Six-plus years moving Buenos Aires.
porQue.item1Desc: Professional driver, vehicle in great shape, punctuality guaranteed.
porQue.item2Desc: On moves: assembly, disassembly, and labor. All coordinated.
porQue.item3Desc: We speak Spanish, Portuguese, and English. Built for expats and tourists.

servicesSection.title: A service for every need.
servicesSection.intro: From a small package to a full move with handyman, including airport transfers and recurring business delivery.
servicesSection.executiveDesc: Executive car service, corporate transfers, and urban rides with a professional driver.
servicesSection.airportDesc: Ezeiza and Aeroparque. Punctual, careful with luggage, multilingual support.
servicesSection.minifletesDesc: Packages, small furniture, door-to-door delivery in CABA and AMBA. Same-day service.
servicesSection.mudanzasDesc: Truck + labor. Furniture assembly and disassembly included in the quote.
servicesSection.logisticaDesc: Recurring deliveries in CABA and AMBA with on-time arrival and predictable cost.
servicesSection.turismoDesc: Explore Buenos Aires with a local guide in Spanish, Portuguese, or English.
servicesSection.petDesc: Your pet travels safe and comfortable. Ideal for moves, vet visits, or long trips.

pasos.title: Three steps. No fuss.
pasos.step1Desc: Tell us what you need to move, from where to where.
pasos.step2Desc: You get the price and availability fast.
pasos.step3Title: We agree on day and time
pasos.step3Desc: We arrive on time, do the service, done.

ctaClose.title: Book your next ride or move on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Executive Transport & Moving in Buenos Aires. We speak Spanish, Portuguese, and English.

about.introTitle: A Buenos Aires company with its own fleet.
about.introP1: Since 2018 Resmor provides executive transport, small moves & delivery, and full moves with handyman in CABA and AMBA. Our base is in Balvanera and our branded vehicles run the city every day.
about.introP2: We work with a simple premise: moving things — or people — should not be a problem. We coordinate via WhatsApp, arrive on time, and take care of what we carry. We support Spanish, Portuguese, and English.
about.valuesIntro: Our brand colors and typography translate who we are.
about.value1Desc: Friendliness, simplicity, and safety. We do what we say we'll do.
about.value2Desc: Executive service done right: clean vehicle, professional driver, careful service.
about.value3Desc: Coordinated by WhatsApp, fast response. No unnecessary paperwork.
about.value4Desc: Local company, direct support, no middlemen. ES / PT / EN.
about.fleetP1: White Renault Kangoo — for small moves, delivery and packages. Mid-size furniture, appliances, door-to-door cargo.
about.fleetP2: Mercedes Vito — for executive transport, airport transfers, groups and luggage. Comfort, space, and air conditioning.
about.fleetP3: All our vehicles carry the Resmor logo visible. You'll always know who's picking you up.
about.locationTitle: Based in Balvanera, central Buenos Aires.
about.locationDesc: Our office is in the heart of Buenos Aires. We cover the whole city (CABA) and the Buenos Aires metropolitan area.

pricing.factorsIntro: We don't publish fixed prices because every service depends on real variables. But we can quote you in minutes.
pricing.factor1Desc: Pickup and drop-off points. CABA, AMBA, suburbs, or provincial route.
pricing.factor2Desc: Volume, weight, fragility, number of passengers and luggage.
pricing.factor3Desc: Whether the move requires assembly/disassembly or extra labor.
pricing.factor4Desc: Weekday, weekend, or holiday. Daytime or evening.
pricing.stepsStep1Desc: WhatsApp or contact form. Tell us what you need and from where.
pricing.stepsStep2Desc: You get the price and availability — usually same day.
pricing.stepsStep3Desc: If it works for you, we book a day and time. We arrive on time.
pricing.paymentFeat4: A or B invoicing for businesses (recurring logistics)

contact.infoDesc: The fastest channel is WhatsApp — we usually reply in minutes. If you prefer, leave your request via the form and we'll open WhatsApp with the message ready to send.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the basics and we'll open WhatsApp with the message ready to send.
contact.formNote: Or message us directly on WhatsApp — the fastest channel.

gallery.ctaTitle: Get a quote for your next move or delivery.
